title: KxPvP Specialzz
description: enhance FPS performance while providing various additional features and improvements to the game
body:
****KxPvP is a Minecraft modpack designed to significantly enhance FPS (Frames Per Second) performance while providing various additional features and improvements to the game. Here's a breakdown of the mods included in the pack and their purposes.****

• ****Continuity**** - Enhances connected textures in Fabric.

• ****YetAnotherConfigLib**** - A library mod that provides configuration capabilities for other mods.

• ****Shulker Box Tooltip**** - Displays the contents of a Shulker Box when hovering over it

• ****More Culling**** - Improves rendering performance by culling unnecessary entities.

• ****ImmediatelyFast**** - Optimizes game performance for faster rendering.

• ****Clean F3**** - Cleans up the debug screen for better visibility.

• ****Cloth Config API**** - A library mod that provides configuration capabilities for other mods.

• ****Sodium**** - A performance-focused rendering engine that improves FPS significantly.

• ****Reese's Sodium Options**** - Provides additional customization options for Sodium.

• ****MaLiLib**** - A library mod that provides various utilities for other mods.

• ****Fabric Language Kotlin**** - Adds Kotlin language support for mod development.

• ****Dynamic FPS**** - Dynamically adjusts FPS for better performance.

• ****Not Enough Animations**** - Adds missing animations to the game for a more immersive experience.

• ****Better Ping Display [Fabric]**** - Improves the display of ping information.

• ****Blur (Fabric)**** - Adds blur effects for aesthetic purposes.

• ****Entity Culling**** - Optimizes entity rendering for improved performance.

• ****Memory Leak Fix**** - Fixes memory leaks for a more stable gameplay experience.

• ****ReplayMod**** - Adds replay functionality for recording and playback.

• ****Indium**** - Provides various optimizations and improvements.

• ****Fabric API**** - A core mod required for many other Fabric mods to function.

• ****Sodium Extra**** - Adds additional performance optimizations for Sodium.

• ****No Fog**** - Removes fog effects for improved visibility.

• ****Chat Heads**** - Adds chat heads for players for easier communication.

• ****Clumps**** - Optimizes item grouping for improved performance.

• ****Iris Shaders**** - Adds shader support for improved visuals.

• ****In-Game Account Switcher**** - Allows players to switch between accounts in-game.

• ****Fast Better Grass**** - Improves the rendering of grass for better performance.

• ****Krypton**** - Provides encryption for network packets.

• ****Satin API**** - A library mod that provides various utilities for other mods.

• ****Motion Blur**** - Adds motion blur effects for visual enhancement.

• ****Lithium**** - Provides various optimizations for server performance.

• ****Wavey Capes**** - Adds wave-like animations to capes for visual enhancement.

• ****Mod Menu**** - Adds a mod menu for easier mod management.

• ****ModernFix**** - Provides various fixes and optimizations for modern gameplay.

• ****Clear Vision Plus**** - Improves visibility for a clearer view.

• ****FerriteCore**** - Adds core functionalities and optimizations.

• ****Zoomify**** - Adds zoom functionality for a closer look.

• ****Essentials**** - A Very Helpful Mod For Free Animated Capes and more features.
AND MANY MORE:-

****Credits-KxPvP [Subscribe]****

****Why Download KxPvP Specialzz? KxPvP Specialzz offers a comprehensive collection of mods that not only enhance FPS performance but also provide a wide range of additional features and improvements to make your Minecraft experience more enjoyable and immersive. Whether you're looking for better performance, enhanced visuals, or new gameplay mechanics, KxPvP Specialzz has you covered. Download it now and take your Minecraft experience to the next level!****
